---
title: "Test"
author: "RLTremblay"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
T_Nan <- matrix(c(
   0.748, 0.137, 0.138,
   0.006, 0.669, 0.374,
   0.001, 0.194, 0.488 ), 
   nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)
```




```{r}
Ne_clonal_Y2000(
  T_mat      = matrix(c(0.789, 0.121, 0.054,
                        0.007, 0.621, 0.335,
                        0.001, 0.258, 0.611), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE),
  F_vec      = c(0.055, 1.328, 2.398),
  D          = c(0.935, 0.038, 0.027),
  L          = 13.399,
  population = "Miz"
)
```


```{r}
Ne_clonal_Y2000(
  T_mat      = matrix(c(0.748, 0.137, 0.138,
                        0.006, 0.669, 0.374,
                        0.001, 0.194, 0.488), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE),
  F_vec      = c(0.138, 2.773, 5.016),
  D          = c(0.958, 0.027, 0.015),
  L          = 8.353,
  population = "Nan"
)
```



```{r}


T_plant <- matrix(c(
  0.30, 0.05, 0.00,
  0.40, 0.65, 0.10,
  0.00, 0.20, 0.80
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

result1 <- Ne_sexual_Y2000(
  T_mat      = T_plant,
  F_vec      = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D          = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  population = "hypothetical herb"
)
print(result1)
```



Mixed model

```{r}
T_herb <- matrix(c(
  0.30, 0.05, 0.00,
  0.40, 0.65, 0.10,
  0.00, 0.20, 0.80
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

r_mixed <- Ne_mixed_Y2000(
  T_mat      = T_herb,
  F_vec      = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D          = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  d          = c(0.0, 0.0, 0.7),
  show_Ny    = TRUE,
  population = "mixed herb (stage 3 = 70% clonal)"
)
print(r_mixed)
```



```{r}
# d out of range
tryCatch(
  Ne_mixed_Y2000(T_mat = T_herb, F_vec = c(0, 0.5, 3),
                 D = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15), d = c(0, 0, 1.5)),
  error = function(e) cat("CAUGHT:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
)

# d missing entirely
tryCatch(
  Ne_mixed_Y2000(T_mat = T_herb, F_vec = c(0, 0.5, 3),
                 D = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15)),
  error = function(e) cat("CAUGHT:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
)
```


```{r}


# Test 1: d=rep(0,3) should match Ne_sexual_Y2000 (true special case)
r_d0 <- Ne_mixed_Y2000(
  T_mat = T_Miz, F_vec = c(0.055, 1.328, 2.398),
  D = c(0.935, 0.038, 0.027), d = rep(0, 3), L = 13.399
)
cat("d=0 Ne/N:", round(r_d0$NeN, 3), "\n")

# Test 2: realistic mixed population
T_herb <- matrix(c(0.30,0.05,0.00, 0.40,0.65,0.10, 0.00,0.20,0.80),
                  nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)
r_mix <- Ne_mixed_Y2000(
  T_mat = T_herb, F_vec = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15), d = c(0.0, 0.0, 0.7),
  show_Ny = TRUE, population = "mixed herb"
)
print(r_mix)
```



```{r}


# Should show non-zero V_term3
T_herb <- matrix(c(0.30,0.05,0.00, 0.40,0.65,0.10, 0.00,0.20,0.80),
                  nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)
r_nonpoisson <- Ne_mixed_Y2000(
  T_mat       = T_herb,
  F_vec       = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D           = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  d           = c(0.0, 0.0, 0.7),
  Vc_over_c   = c(1, 1, 2),     # stage 3 clonal output more variable than Poisson
  population  = "mixed herb (non-Poisson clonal variance)"
)
print(r_nonpoisson)
cat("V_term3 non-zero:", r_nonpoisson$V_term3 != 0, "\n")
cat("Ne/N lower than Poisson:", r_nonpoisson$NeN < 0.751, "\n")
```


Test sensitivity 

```{r}


# Quick test — L sensitivity for Fritillaria Miz
T_Miz <- matrix(c(0.789,0.121,0.054, 0.007,0.621,0.335,
                   0.001,0.258,0.611), nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)

sens_L <- Ne_sensitivity_L(
  model_fn   = Ne_clonal_Y2000,
  T_mat      = T_Miz,
  F_vec      = c(0.055, 1.328, 2.398),
  D          = c(0.935, 0.038, 0.027),
  L_range    = seq(5, 25, by = 1),
  L_ref      = 13.399,
  population = "Fritillaria Miz"
)
print(sens_L$data)
sens_L$plot
```



```{r}
# Test 2 — Vk sensitivity (sexual model)
T_herb <- matrix(c(0.30,0.05,0.00, 0.40,0.65,0.10, 0.00,0.20,0.80),
                  nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)

sens_Vk <- Ne_sensitivity_Vk(
  model_fn    = Ne_sexual_Y2000,
  T_mat       = T_herb,
  F_vec       = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D           = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  stage_index = 3,
  Vk_range    = seq(0.5, 6, by = 0.5),
  population  = "hypothetical herb"
)
print(sens_Vk$data)
sens_Vk$plot

# Test 3 — Vc sensitivity (mixed model)
sens_Vc <- Ne_sensitivity_Vc(
  T_mat       = T_herb,
  F_vec       = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D           = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  d           = c(0.0, 0.0, 0.7),
  stage_index = 3,
  Vc_range    = seq(0.5, 6, by = 0.5),
  population  = "mixed herb"
)
print(sens_Vc$data)
sens_Vc$plot

# Test 4 — d sensitivity with non-Poisson clonal variance
sens_d <- Ne_sensitivity_d(
  T_mat       = T_herb,
  F_vec       = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D           = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  d_fixed     = c(0.0, 0.0, 0.5),
  stage_index = 3,
  Vc_over_c   = c(1, 1, 3),
  population  = "mixed herb (Vc/c_bar=3)"
)
print(sens_d$data)
sens_d$plot
```



```{r}
# Vk data — should not have run yet, paste this
print(sens_Vk$data)

# All four plots
sens_L$plot
sens_Vk$plot
sens_Vc$plot
sens_d$plot
```


```{r}




T_herb <- matrix(c(0.30,0.05,0.00, 0.40,0.65,0.10, 0.00,0.20,0.80),
                  nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)

sens_Vk <- Ne_sensitivity_Vk(
  model_fn    = Ne_sexual_Y2000,
  T_mat       = T_herb,
  F_vec       = c(0.0, 0.5, 3.0),
  D           = c(0.60, 0.25, 0.15),
  stage_index = 3,
  Vk_range    = seq(0.5, 6, by = 0.5),
  population  = "hypothetical herb"
)

class(sens_Vk)
print(sens_Vk)
```
